name: Dandys World hospital au
description:
Roles:

(Male) Dandy: Head Doctor

(Male) Astro: surgeon

(Female) Shelly: Blind patient

(Male) Pebble: therapy dog

(Male) Sprout: dentist and cardiac Doctor (his helper: cosmo)

(Female) Vee: ICU doctor

(Female) Poppy: patient (infection)

(Male) Boxten: shy patient (coughing Blood)

(Female) Scraps: recovering patient (sibling is goob)

(Male) Goob: recovering patient (sibling is scraps)

(Female) Toodles: Kid patient (her Dad is Rodger) (Fever)

(Male) Rodger: therapist

(Male) Cosmo: dental asisstant and cardiac nurse (helps sprout as he is his friend)

(Male) Looey: patient (lung problems)

(Female) Yatta: Psycho patient (low sanity)

(Female) Brightney: ICU nurse

(Males) Razzle & Dazzle: caretakers

(Female) Flutter: mute patient (fell of a Cliff)

(Female) Gigi: sneaky patient (Got Shot)

(Male) Finn: clumsy patient (fell off a Boat breaking his Body)

(Male) Shrimpo: violent patient (car crash)

(Male) Glisten: pulmonary Doctor

(Female)Tisha: janitor

And My oc

(Male) Cosmic: Kid patient (tooth infection, heart problems) (Cosmos Little Brother, 1,5 years old, Can't Walk or talk Yet, Can't swallow pills Yet)
